assertions.assertion: Mentions that ACS URLs must use HTTP-POST binding (HTTP-Redirect is not supported for ACS)
assertions.rationale: This Duende-specific restriction is not general SAML knowledge (SAML spec allows both bindings for ACS).

assertions.assertion: States that AllowedScopes must contain at least one entry
assertions.rationale: AllowedScopes as a Duende validation requirement is product-specific.
EntityId being required is general SAML knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Explains that invalid SPs are treated as non-existent (returns null from store)
assertions.rationale: This is Duende-specific validation behavior not in general knowledge.
